channel.title: Wallet on QRL Ecosystem Index
channel.description: Recent content in Wallet on QRL Ecosystem Index

item.title: MyQRLWallet
item.description:
MyQRLWallet is a DigitalGuards web wallet for QRL 2.0. It provides a browser-based interface for creating accounts and managing transactions on the quantum-resistant ledger.

The wallet is part of the DigitalGuards QRL Zond ecosystem and links to a public frontend repository.
